ddls:
CREATE TABLE "thermal_zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal zone */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building where the zone is located */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number where the zone is located */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the thermal zone */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of the thermal zone (e.g., office, lobby) */,
  "avg_occupants" REAL /* Average number of occupants in the zone */,
  "nominal_occupants" REAL /* Nominal number of occupants in the zone */,
  "max_occupants" INTEGER /* Maximum allowable number of occupants in the zone */,
  "comfort_level" INTEGER /* Subjective comfort rating (1-10) */,
  "zone_volume" REAL /* Volume of the thermal zone in cubic feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ventilation_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ventilation rate */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal zone */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for ventilation rates */,
  "avg_mech_vent" REAL /* Average mechanical ventilation rate (ach) */,
  "min_mech_vent" REAL /* Minimum mechanical ventilation rate (ach) */,
  "avg_infiltration" REAL /* Average infiltration rate (ach) */,
  "min_infiltration" REAL /* Minimum infiltration rate (ach) */,
  "avg_simple_vent" REAL /* Average simple ventilation rate (ach) */,
  "min_simple_vent" REAL /* Minimum simple ventilation rate (ach) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the ventilation rates were measured */,
  "external_temp" REAL /* External temperature at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ventilation_rates_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy_data" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy data point */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal zone */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., entry, exit) */,
  "occupancy_level" REAL /* Occupancy level (percentage) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the occupancy data point */,
  "source_sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that recorded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_data_source_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the thermal zone */,
  "sensor_brand" TEXT /* Brand of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "reading" REAL /* Sensor reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor reading */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES thermal_zones ("zone_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each thermal zone
ID of the building where the zone is located
Floor number where the zone is located
Type of the thermal zone (e.g., office, lobby)
Average number of occupants in the zone
Nominal number of occupants in the zone
Maximum allowable number of occupants in the zone
Volume of the thermal zone in cubic feet
Unique identifier for each ventilation rate
Unit of measurement for ventilation rates
Date when the ventilation rates were measured
External temperature at the time of measurement
Unique identifier for each occupancy data point
Timestamp of the occupancy data point
ID of the sensor that recorded the data
Date when the sensor was installed
